column1: # SCADABLE captive-portal provisioning firmware partition table.
# Layout matches the standard ESP-IDF two-OTA pattern so the customer
# firmware that lands via OTA later can swap into ota_0 / ota_1 without
# clobbering NVS (WiFi creds + device cert) or scadable_data (log buffer).
#   ota_0 / ota_1  (1.5M)  big enough for libscadable + customer code + TLS
# Total: ~3.2M — fits the 4M flash on plain ESP32 dev boards. ESP32-S3
# boards typically ship with 8M+ so there's headroom.
